case_title: LORETTA D. JACK et al VS. JOSEPH R. JACK

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACK, LORETTA D.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY JACK, LORETTA D. JACK, RAYMOND AS TO DEFENDANT JACK, JOSEPH R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($35.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED SEP-12-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JACK, JOSEPH R.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACK, LORETTA D. JACK, RAYMOND AS TO DEFENDANT JACK, JOSEPH R. CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-06-2012 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL-
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-06-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-20-2011 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO DEC-06-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. CONTINUED FOR JUDGE MITCHELL TO HEAR CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID HELBRAUN. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
